title: Green Blade BB-GS111 Telescopic Handle Trowel
features: Perfect Trowel For All Planting And Gardening Needs. Use As Both A Long Handled Garden Trowel And A Short Handle Trowel.
Perfect Trowel For Potting Plants And Moving Around Small Batches Of Garden Soil Etc.
Carbon Steel Head For Durability. Ultra Soft Cushion Grip To Reduce The Stress On Your Hands When Using And Give A More Secure Tool Grip
Save Constant Bending By Simply Extending Your Trowel To Your Desired Length. Telescopic Trowel Extends From 635mm To 950mm.
Simply Turn The Trowel Handle To Extend The Trowel. Turn The Handle The Opposite Way To Tighten Handle Length.
description: Product Description Telescopic garden trowel, perfect trowel for all planting and gardening needs. Trowel can be used in all aspects of gardening and landscaping. The perfect all round garden tool. This excellent quality telescopic trowel comes with a soft cushion grip & hanging clip. Ultra soft cushion grip to reduce the stress on your hands when using and give a more secure tool grip. Store easily and neatly by using the hanging clip. Garden trowel with carbon steel head for durability. Save constant bending by simply extending your trowel to your desired length. Telescopic Trowel Extends From 635mm To 950mm. Box Contains 1 x Piece
